{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Dreadgod birthplace
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The tanks were the birthplace of the [[Dreadgods]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c19">''Reaper'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
